title: Falling in Love Abroad
content: During a language course in Italy, Noah expected to improve his English and explore a new country. Instead, he met Sofia, a student from Spain who enjoyed wandering through small streets and discovering hidden cafés. They spent weekends visiting museums, tasting local food, and practicing English together. At first, they believed their friendship would end when the course finished. However, saying goodbye at the airport was much harder than either of them expected. They promised to keep talking every day. What began as a short adventure abroad slowly became a relationship that crossed countries, cultures, and languages.
